title: Bee Removal in Melrose, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Melrose, Bronx. Safe, humane extraction starting at $350. Servicing residential buildings and homes near St. Mary's Park. Call now!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Melrose, one of the Bronx's most vibrant neighborhoods. Whether you're dealing with bees in your apartment building, multi-family home, or local business near Third Avenue, our certified technicians respond quickly to safely remove colonies and prevent future infestations. We understand the unique challenges of bee problems in Melrose's dense residential areas and deliver effective, humane solutions at competitive prices.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Melrose and the greater Bronx area, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with safe, eco-friendly bee removal techniques. Our licensed specialists arrive promptly, assess your specific situation, and remove bee colonies without harmful chemicals, protecting your family, neighbors, and the environment.
localContext: Melrose's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, brownstones, and newer residential developments near St. Mary's Park and along Melrose Avenue creates ideal conditions for bee nesting in wall cavities, vents, and rooftops. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and proximity to green spaces like Franz Sigel Park attract pollinators that sometimes establish colonies too close to homes and businesses.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Melrose?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Melrose typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the colony size, location accessibility, and complexity of the removal. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in Melrose?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Melrose and the Bronx. Our team understands that bee colonies near entryways or in high-traffic areas pose immediate concerns, especially in multi-family buildings, so we prioritize urgent calls and typically arrive within 2-4 hours during business hours.

faqs.question: Do you remove bees humanely?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We prioritize live bee removal and relocation whenever possible, working with local beekeepers to rehome colonies safely. Our methods protect beneficial pollinators while ensuring your property is completely bee-free and secured against re-infestation.

faqs.question: What types of properties in Melrose do you service?
faqs.answer: We service all property types in Melrose, including apartment buildings, single-family homes, brownstones, commercial spaces, and community facilities. Our technicians are experienced working in the neighborhood's diverse building stock, from historic walk-ups to modern residential complexes along the Grand Concourse corridor.
